MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT LAWRENCE M. KING'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE (OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT).

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-24-2010 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Continued To Dec-03-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LAWRENCE KING'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE. Appearances: David Marcolini (568.0742) for plaintiff and responding party. No other appearances. Mr. Marcolini represented that plaintiff's wish to dismiss the case as plaintiff was notified that defendant filed for bankruptcy. The court directed Mr. Marcolini to file the required judicial council form. Pending plaintiff's dismissal, the court adopted its tentative ruling and continued the matter to December 3, 2010. All parties to lodge courtesy copies with department 302 per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
